content.text:
[cron:b824f7b0-7497-4984-b0ff-d1bd45539f3c daily-email-review-and-whatsapp-reminder] Review the Gmail inbox of atlas.ia.agente@gmail.com using gog. Look for forwarded messages from Gustavo's personal email, pending items for today, and near-term deadlines. Organize the relevant items into the appropriate shared calendar flow for Gustavo by citing/scheduling what applies toward toledo970501@gmail.com, then send Gustavo a concise WhatsApp reminder to +573183718246 with what he has pending today and any nearby deadlines. Include important context if relevant. Example current context: he has 3 days from 2026-03-24 to complete a ZooLATECH challenge. Be concise and practical.
Current time: Tuesday, March 31st, 2026 — 8:30 AM (America/Bogota) / 2026-03-31 13:30 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
